product.name: AUXITO 9005 Bulbs, 30000LM 6500K Cool White, Direct Replacement 9005/HB3 Light Bulbs Fanless, Plug and Play CANbus Ready No Flicker, Pack of 2
features: Long Lifespan - All aluminum body and IP68 waterproof design make sure AUXITO 9005 bulbs can work perfectly in harsh weather, greatly extends the lifespan up to 60000 Hrs, freeing you from the trouble of frequent replacements

Advanced Beam Pattern - Achieve the most perfect beam pattern with AUXITO 9005 LED bulbs, these lights offer the best light pattern and clarity for optimal visibility—no dark spots, shadow areas, blinding, or glare for oncoming drivers, enhancing safety significantly

900% Ultra Brightness - AUXITO 9005 bulbs adopt high-quality LED chips with 6500K cool white, making them 900% brighter than the original halogen bulbs. These bulbs provide you with the best visibility and ensure the best possible illumination for a safer driving experience

Easy Installation - 9005/HB3 bulbs are all-in-one design, 1:1 mini size as halogen bulbs, perfectly fit into car housing and factory sockets. Compared to other HBS bulbs, ours are without an external driver and connector, non-polarity, no adapter required, truly plug and play. Easy to install within 5 mins

Compatible With 99% Of Vehicle - AUXITO led 9005 have a built-in CANBUS decoder, making them perfectly compatible with 99% of vehicles. Some vehicles may require an additional decoder. Please check your owner's manual or the part number on your original bulbs before purchasing
